name: Plaid
one_liner: Financial data network that connects apps to users' bank accounts for balances, transactions, identity, auth, payments, and KYC/underwriting data.
access_notes: Creating a free Plaid Dashboard account immediately provisions working Sandbox client_id/secret for full API testing with test institutions and simulated data. Sandbox requires no payment or approval. Production access (real user bank connections) requires a separate Production approval/application step and moves to paid usage, but a working self-serve credential path exists via Sandbox.
api_notes: JSON over HTTPS; all requests are POST. Broad surface across many products: Auth, Balance, Identity, Transactions, Investments, Liabilities, Transfer/Payments, Assets, Income, Statements, Identity Verification, Monitor, Signal, Consumer Report, Enrich, Layer. Uses a Link token + public_token/access_token exchange flow, then per-product endpoints. Well over 100 endpoints across products.
mcp_notes: Plaid (the vendor) ships two official MCP servers: a remote Dashboard MCP server (https://api.dashboard.plaid.com/mcp/, Streamable HTTP, OAuth, production diagnostics/analytics) and a local 'AI Coding Toolkit' MCP server (mock data, docs search, sandbox tokens, webhook simulation). Documented at plaid.com/docs/resources/mcp/. Dashboard MCP noted as under active development with limited support.
main_blocker: Sandbox is fully self-serve for building/testing; the only real gate is Production approval to access real end-user bank data, which requires an application and paid usage.

evidence.claim: Plaid API is JSON over HTTP with POST requests, authenticated by client_id and secret sent in body or PLAID-CLIENT-ID/PLAID-SECRET headers; Sandbox and Production environments exist.
Signing up for a Plaid Dashboard account provides a live client_id and secret; Sandbox available on signup.
Plaid offers official MCP servers (Dashboard MCP and AI Coding Toolkit) documented on the official docs site.
Plaid product catalog spans Auth, Balance, Identity, Transactions, Investments, Liabilities, Transfer, Identity Verification, Monitor, Signal, Consumer Report, Assets, Income, Statements, Layer.

open_questions: Exact terms/cost thresholds for moving from free Sandbox to approved Production access; whether any products (e.g., Transfer, Identity Verification) require additional per-product enablement or contracts.
